name: Georgian Marinade
recipeInstructions:
A citrus-and-spice mixture from the Republic of Georgia. It is often used for poultry, but it goes well with swordfish too.
1. Grate the zest of 1 orange and 1 lemon; set aside.
2. Juice the oranges and lemons.
3. Combine the orange juice, lemon juice, and wine in a saucepan and boil rapidly until only 1/2 cup liquid remains. Let cool.
4. Combine onions, garlic, and ginger in a bowl. Stir in the reduced juice mixture, grated zest, paprika, oil, sugar, peppercorns, salt, nutmeg, and cinnamon sticks.
Makes 1 1/2 cups.
